name: Eyebolt M6 DIN 580
description: M6 lifting eye bolt per DIN 580. Screws into bulkhead T-nut or threaded insert. Primary recovery attachment point for shock cord. Eye inner diameter 20mm, accepts quick link up to 14mm wire.

name: Eyebolt M8 DIN 580
description: M8 lifting eye bolt per DIN 580. Screws into bulkhead T-nut or threaded insert. Primary recovery attachment point for shock cord. Eye inner diameter 25mm, accepts quick link up to 17mm wire.

name: Eyebolt M10 DIN 580
description: M10 lifting eye bolt per DIN 580. Screws into bulkhead T-nut or threaded insert. Primary recovery attachment point for shock cord. Eye inner diameter 30mm, accepts quick link up to 21mm wire.

name: Eyebolt M12 DIN 580
description: M12 lifting eye bolt per DIN 580. Screws into bulkhead T-nut or threaded insert. Primary recovery attachment point for shock cord. Eye inner diameter 36mm, accepts quick link up to 25mm wire.

name: Rail Button 1010
description: Standard rail button for 1010 8020 aluminum extrusion launch rail. Button width 9.0mm fits 1010 T-slot. Mounted to rocket body tube with single screw through center. Guides rocket along launch rail, releases cleanly at lift-off.

name: Rail Button 1515
description: Standard rail button for 1515 8020 aluminum extrusion launch rail. Button width 12.0mm fits 1515 T-slot. Mounted to rocket body tube with single screw through center. Guides rocket along launch rail, releases cleanly at lift-off.

name: Quick Link 3mm
description: 3mm wire oval quick link (screw-gate). Connects shock cord to eyebolt, parachute bridle to harness, or swivel to recovery hardware. Working load limit ~400kg. Inner opening 11x25mm.

name: Quick Link 4mm
description: 4mm wire oval quick link (screw-gate). Connects shock cord to eyebolt, parachute bridle to harness, or swivel to recovery hardware. Working load limit ~800kg. Inner opening 13x30mm.

name: Quick Link 6mm
description: 6mm wire oval quick link (screw-gate). Connects shock cord to eyebolt, parachute bridle to harness, or swivel to recovery hardware. Working load limit ~1600kg. Inner opening 18x42mm.

name: GoPro Step Mount
description: 3-prong GoPro-compatible finger mount for rocket camera bay. Standard GoPro pivoting finger mount geometry. Accepts GoPro Hero/Session cameras and compatible action cameras. Base mounts to payload bay step adapter with 4x M3 screws. Pivot hole accepts M5 thumb screw.
